LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_GrowToggleDesc: When ready, spend {0} acid per offspring to immediately fill up to {1} active spitlings. Each brood requires {2} hours to recharge.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_AssembleDesc: Select an allied fingerspike, trispike, or toughspike as the fusion anchor. Nearby spine fleshbeasts will gather and merge into an acid broodmother.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_NoDonors: Not enough available spine fleshbeasts to assemble an acid broodmother.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_AssemblyInvalid: The acid broodmother assembly cannot begin.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_NoGatherCells: There is not enough reachable space around the selected anchor.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmother_AssemblyStarted: {0} fleshbeasts with a total fusion value of {1} are gathering.
